creator: jaj@hcl-club.lu
text:
Hi!
You are right, functionality from the X11-extras package is included in
the X11 package version 1.4.1, rendering x11/hs-x11-extras-ghc
obsolete. I approve the deletion but this will also need small changes
to the x11-wm/xmonad port which depends on it (maintainer CC-ed).

Best regards,
Jona
